data.title: XMax Advances AI Strategy Through Development and Deployment of An AI Inference Platform
data.description: On April 8, 2026, XMax Inc. (NASDAQ: XWIN) revealed progress in its AI initiative by launching an AI inference platform. This move signifies a significant step in the company's transition towards a software-oriented and platform-centric AI business model.

data.title: Con Edison to Report 1st Quarter 2026 Earnings on May 7
data.description: Consolidated Edison, Inc., also known as Con Edison (NYSE: ED), is scheduled to announce its financial results for the 1st Quarter of 2026 on May 7, 2026, after the market closes. This holding company offers various energy-related products and services. Investors and stakeholders can anticipate the release of important figures regarding the company's performance during the first quarter of the year.

data.title: LEIFRAS Co., Ltd. Reports Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: In the latest financial report, LEIFRAS Co., Ltd. (Nasdaq: LFS) has announced a significant increase in its financial performance. The company witnessed a record-high revenue, rising by 13.5% compared to the previous year. Additionally, their operating income also saw a notable boost, increasing by 20.7% year over year. LEIFRAS Co., Ltd., which focuses on youth sports and community involvement, released this data on April 8, 2026, in Tokyo. These impressive numbers point towards the company's success and growth in the sports and social business sector.

data.title: Lennar Corporation Declares Quarterly Dividends
data.description: Lennar Corporation, a prominent homebuilder in the United States, recently disclosed that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.50 per share for both Class A and Class B common stock. This dividend is set to be paid on May 6, 2026. Lennar Corporation is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbols LEN and LEN.B.

data.title: Catalyst Bancorp, Inc. Announces Agreement to Acquire Lakeside Bancshares, Inc.
data.description: Opelousas, Louisiana - On April 8, 2026, Catalyst Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: CLST) revealed its acquisition of Lakeside Bancshares, Inc. (OTC Markets: LKSB) in a strategic move. Catalyst Bancorp is the parent company of Catalyst Bank, while Lakeside Bancshares is the parent company of Lakeside Bank. This new development comes as Catalyst aims to expand its market presence and improve its financial services. The acquisition is set to bring together the strengths of both institutions and bolster their offerings for customers. This acquisition signifies a significant step for Catalyst, adding to its current portfolio and potentially increasing its market share.

data.title: Welltower Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release, Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: Toledo, Ohio - On April 8, 2026, Welltower® Inc. disclosed plans to unveil its first quarter 2026 financial report post the closure of the market on NYSE by April 28, 2026. The company will conduct a conference call and webcast following the release. Welltower Inc.'s stock is listed as WELL on NYSE.

data.title: Speakeasy Dispensary Expands Product Selection While Advancing More Accessible Pricing Across Kentucky
data.description: In Lexington, Kentucky, on April 8, 2026, Speakeasy Dispensary revealed a noteworthy drop in prices at its various locations in the state. This change comes as a result of a cooperative effort among cultivators, processors, and retailers to enhance availability of medical cannabis for patients throughout Kentucky.

data.title: ALS Network Calls on Members of Congress to Support Critical Legislation
data.description: The ALS Network has endorsed the revival of the Accelerating Access to Critical Therapies for ALS Act (H.R.8205) in Los Angeles on April 8, 2026. This act aims to expedite the development of treatments and potential cures for ALS. The reauthorization of the act is expected to contribute significantly in advancing research for ALS, a neurodegenerative disease. The ALS Network's support underscores the urgency of this bipartisan initiative in driving crucial advancements in this field.

data.title: ADP Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
data.description: On April 8, 2026, in Roseland, New Jersey, the board of directors at Automatic Data Processing, Inc. (Nasdaq: ADP) announced a regular quarterly dividend of $1.70 per share. This dividend will be paid on July 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 12, 2026. ADP (Nasdaq: ADP) is a prominent company that has been making a significant impact in the industry.

data.title: Don Francisco's Coffee Builds on its Partnership with Olive Crest to Support Families During National Child Abuse Prevention Month
data.description: Los Angeles, 8 April 2026 - Don Francisco's® Coffee is extending its collaboration with Olive Crest®, a nonprofit organization committed to thwarting child abuse and supporting families in need. In observation of National Child Abuse Prevention Month in April 2026, a percentage of the proceeds will be donated to Olive Crest.

data.title: Baltimore Community Foundation Announces Legacy Forward Grant Recipients Supporting Programming Across Baltimore in Celebration of America's 250th Anniversary
data.description: Nineteen community organizations in Baltimore have been granted funding to support public programs that delve into the realms of history, civic affairs, and Maryland's significance within the American narrative. This initiative was carried out by the Baltimore Community Foundation (BCF), a nonprofit entity dedicated to fostering connections among individuals who share a passion for community development. The funding is aimed at bolstering programs that shed light on Maryland's historical and civic contributions, further solidifying its place in American history.

data.title: Janus Living Announces Dates of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release, Conference Call, and Webcast
data.description: Janus Living, Inc., a senior housing REIT listed on NYSE as JAN, will announce its first quarter 2026 financial results after the NYSE trading hours on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. A conference call and webcast will be held on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time to discuss financial performance. Investors can access the conference call for details.

data.title: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. (KREF) has announced that it will be releasing its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on April 22, 2026, after the close of trading on the NYSE. Following this, there will be a conference call on April 23, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET to discuss these results. The call can be accessed by dialing (844) 784-1730 for U.S. callers or +1 (412) 380-7410 for non-U.S. callers.

data.title: The RMR Group Fiscal Second Quarter 2026 Conference Call Scheduled for Thursday, May 7th
data.description: Newton, Massachusetts - The RMR Group disclosed that they will release their fiscal Q2 2026 financial results after Nasdaq's closing on May 6, 2026. Subsequently, on May 7, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. ET, a conference call with President/CEO Adam Portnoy, COO Matt Jordan, and CFO/Treasurer Matt Brown will take place to review the outcomes. This announcement was made today by The RMR Group under Nasdaq as RMR.

data.title: Service Properties Trust First Quarter 2026 Conference Call Scheduled for Thursday, May 7th
data.description: Service Properties Trust (Nasdaq: SVC) from Newton, Mass., is set to release its first quarter 2026 financial results after Nasdaq closes on May 6, 2026. A conference call will be held on May 7, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time, with President/CEO Christopher Bilotto, CFO/Treasurer Brian Donley, and VP Jesse Abair discussing the results. Investors can join the call using the provided telephone number.

data.title: Champion® Homes Wins MHI Excellence in Manufactured Housing Award for 12th Consecutive Year
data.description: Champion Homes, Inc. (NYSE: SKY) based in Troy, Michigan, has secured the Manufactured Housing Institute (MHI) Excellence in Manufactured Housing Award for an impressive 12 consecutive years. This year, they excelled in the Manufactured Home Design – CrossMod® category according to the announcement. With this latest win, Champion Homes has now garnered a total of 27 Excellence in Manufactured Housing Awards over the last 12 years, underscoring the company's extensive range and quality of products.

data.title: Constellation Brands Stock Fizzles After Q4 Earnings: Here's Why
data.description: Shares of Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE: STZ) surged in after-hours trading on Wednesday following the release of its fourth-quarter earnings report and a disappointing fiscal 2027 forecast. The company, known for brands like Modelo and Corona, exceeded expectations with quarterly earnings of $1.90 per share compared to the estimated $1.71. Quarterly revenue also surpassed expectations at $1.92 billion, beating the anticipated $1.86 billion, although it was lower than the previous year's $2.16 billion. For more information, please visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: McCormick Declares $0.48 Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In Hunt Valley, Maryland, on April 8, 2026, the Board of Directors of McCormick & Company, Inc. (NYSE: MKC) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.48 per share for its common stocks. The dividend will be payable on April 27, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of April 20, 2026. This marks the 102nd year of the company’s dividend payments.
